narrative:
Precinct Racine Village (precinct in Meigs County) has 440 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.8 percentage points.
